context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies the spec quality gate (detecting unresolved [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] items, checking FR-XXX count, and assessing measurable criteria) and produces a semantic diff when re-planning over an existing plan.md, showing what changed in a bordered box format with downstream impact.

checklist.name: NEEDS CLARIFICATION flagged
checklist.description: planning-notes.md or agent output mentions that [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] items were found in spec.md (FR-001 max file size and FR-005 URL expiry)

checklist.name: FR count assessed
checklist.description: planning-notes.md or agent output shows the FR-XXX pattern count was checked (spec has 6 FR items, which is ≥ 3 so should NOT trigger ERROR, but the check should be visible)

checklist.name: Measurable criteria warning
checklist.description: planning-notes.md or agent output flags that success criteria SC-001 through SC-004 lack numeric/time/percentage measurements (e.g., a WARNING about no measurable criteria)

checklist.name: Quality score reported
checklist.description: planning-notes.md includes a spec quality score (e.g., 'Score: X/10') or an equivalent quality assessment summary

checklist.name: Semantic diff present
checklist.description: planning-notes.md contains a section comparing old vs new plan (semantic diff), identifying changes to tech stack, architecture, or dependencies

checklist.name: Semantic diff format
checklist.description: The semantic diff uses a bordered box format with +--- borders and +Added / ~Changed / -Removed markers (or equivalent structured diff format from the skill's formatting guide)

checklist.name: Downstream impact flagged
checklist.description: planning-notes.md or the semantic diff notes downstream impact — specifically that tasks.md or implementation work may need updates due to the changed architecture

checklist.name: Updated plan has new dependencies
checklist.description: The updated plan.md adds dependencies related to virus scanning (e.g., ClamAV, a malware scanning library or service) that were absent in the original plan

checklist.name: Updated architecture diagram
checklist.description: The updated plan.md includes a more detailed architecture section that reflects the new components (virus scanner, quota service, or similar) beyond the original simple three-box diagram

checklist.name: No governance in plan
checklist.description: The updated plan.md does NOT contain project-wide principles, non-negotiable rules, or team process requirements — these belong in CONSTITUTION.md

checklist.name: Clarification assumptions documented
checklist.description: The planning-notes.md or plan.md explicitly documents the assumptions made for the two [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] items (file size limit and URL expiry), rather than leaving them unresolved
